action.reasoning: Observation: Persistent ModuleNotFoundError for xgboost (never installed as packages_to_install was omitted in all prior JSON actions despite code in model.py/train.py/predict.py being XGB-ready with MAE objective/hist/early_stopping; best MAE remains 0.2188 from RF iter6, MLP worse at 0.231). Iter7 curve shows smooth loss drop to ~0.22 plateau. Analysis: XGB with reg:absoluteerror + early stopping on val + hist method will beat RF (~0.15-0.18 MAE expected) on sparse 2048-dim Morgan FP (r=3) tabular regression for QM9 gaps; FP calc time acceptable (~5min) with 1.79h/10 iters left. ConvertToNumpyArray will speed FP gen vs bit loop. Decision: Install xgboost (persists), rewrite model/train/predict.py cleanly for XGB (n_est=1000,depth=9,lr=0.1,early_stop=50), full CSV data, val_mae logging to metrics.jsonl, pickle save/load, then train+submit_eval for better score/timing before Mordred/3D opts.
